records.correct_root_cause: queue head-of-line blocking in rate-limiter-edge, not what the agent said
records.correct_remediation: increase rate-limiter-edge concurrency limit to 2x and re-rate-limit upstream
records.agent_root_cause: Redis connection pool exhaustion under load
